title: linum flagellare
intro: Linum flagellare, also known as prickly flax, is a plant species in the genus Linum, characterized by its prickly stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linum flagellare include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Linum flagellare can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
